# la_table_schemas.csv

**Generated by:** [`collect_table_info.py`](../collect_table_info.md)
**Granularity:** One row per (table, column) pair
**Type:** Schema reference (documentation-sourced)

## Overview

Column-level schemas for tables documented in Azure Monitor and Defender XDR reference pages. Generated by fetching rendered HTML pages from learn.microsoft.com and parsing the column tables.

This file is one of the inputs merged into the unified [`table_schemas.csv`](table_schemas.md) by [`map_solutions_connectors_tables.py`](../map_solutions_connectors_tables.md) (via `--la-table-schemas-csv`).

## Use Cases

- **Documented schema lookup** — for any well-known LA/XDR table, fetch its columns and types as documented.
- **Schema-discovery upstream** — feeds `table_schemas.csv` for tables not covered by DCR or connector ARM definitions.
- **Defender XDR coverage** — includes columns documented only in the Defender XDR advanced-hunting schema.

> Column schemas are only collected when `--skip-details` is not passed, since they require fetching rendered HTML pages (column tables use `!INCLUDE` directives that are only resolved server-side).

## Columns

| Column | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `table_name` | Table name |
| `column_name` | Column name |
| `column_type` | KQL data type (e.g., `string`, `datetime`, `dynamic`, `real`, `boolean`, `int`) |
| `description` | Column description from documentation |

## Related CSVs

- [`table_schemas.csv`](table_schemas.md) — unified schema CSV that merges this file with DCR, connector ARM, and KQL validation sources.
- [`tables_reference.csv`](tables_reference.md) — table-level metadata (sibling output of `collect_table_info.py`).
- [`asim_fields.csv`](asim_fields.md) — for ASIM tables, schema info from this file is also merged via `table_schemas.csv` Phase 3 of `collect_asim_fields.py`.
